title: Western Heads get new wildfire unit
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA  NEWS - The Western Heads Fire Management Unit (WH FMU), that covers about 35km² within the Knysna municipal area, has officially launched its own Wildfire Strike Unit - a major milestone in community-based disaster preparedness.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Western Heads Fire Management Unit (WH FMU), that covers about 35km² within the Knysna municipal area, has officially launched its own Wildfire Strike Unit - a major milestone in community-based disaster preparedness."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This new unit is the result of years of effort by residents, local fire authorities, and external partners, prompted by the devastating 2017 wildfires."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A history shaped by fire","html":"A history shaped by fire"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Heads area, which includes the isolated communities of Brenton-on-Sea, Lake Brenton, Belvidere and Buffalo Bay, suffered serious wildfire events in 2009 and again in June 2017.","html":"The Western Heads area, which includes the isolated communities of Brenton-on-Sea, Lake Brenton, Belvidere and Buffalo Bay, suffered serious wildfire events in 2009 and again in June 2017."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These fires exposed the region's vulnerability and the urgent need for co-ordinated local response and mitigation strategies.","html":"These fires exposed the region's vulnerability and the urgent need for co-ordinated local response and mitigation strategies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the aftermath of 2017, residents took action - clearing invasive alien vegetation and forming closer ties with fire protection organisations.","html":"In the aftermath of 2017, residents took action - clearing invasive alien vegetation and forming closer ties with fire protection organisations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From idea to reality","html":"From idea to reality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concept of a dedicated Wildfire Strike Unit was first proposed in early 2024.","html":"The concept of a dedicated Wildfire Strike Unit was first proposed in early 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the support of Dirk Smit of the Southern Cape Fire Protection Association (SCFPA) and Knysna Fire Chief Ian Bezuidenhout, the idea quickly gained momentum.","html":"With the support of Dirk Smit of the Southern Cape Fire Protection Association (SCFPA) and Knysna Fire Chief Ian Bezuidenhout, the idea quickly gained momentum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A successful presentation to the Supporting Fire Services group led to a commitment in early 2025 to fully fund the project - the first time the organisation has backed a unit of this type.","html":"A successful presentation to the Supporting Fire Services group led to a commitment in early 2025 to fully fund the project - the first time the organisation has backed a unit of this type."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Equipped and operational","html":"Equipped and operational"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By August, the team had secured a suitable vehicle from Cape Town, a skid unit donated by SCFPA, and essential hoses and manual tools.","html":"By August, the team had secured a suitable vehicle from Cape Town, a skid unit donated by SCFPA, and essential hoses and manual tools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With regular volunteer training now in place, the unit has already responded to two local incidents and stands ready to assist in future emergencies.","html":"With regular volunteer training now in place, the unit has already responded to two local incidents and stands ready to assist in future emergencies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Western Heads get new wildfire unit
